cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: Onboarding that celebrates the spirit of Halloween.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body:
Halloween Academy is an engaging and exciting onboarding experience designed to welcome and energize temporary employees at Party City. It redefines seasonal training by immersing team members in a fun, festive learning environment that celebrates the spirit of Halloween.

Halloween Academy equips employees with the skills and confidence needed to thrive in their roles during the busiest time of the year, transforming training into a meaningful and enjoyable experience.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: Engaging, meaningful, and focused on employee success.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body:
1. Clear Role Breakdown: We have created visually dynamic graphic posters to provide an easy-to-understand overview of roles and responsibilities, ensuring employees feel confident in their positions.

2. Recognition and Gratitude: Seasonal hires are celebrated through thank-you letters and team recognition, fostering a sense of appreciation and belonging.

3. Opportunities for Growth: The Academy highlights pathways to turn a seasonal role into a full-time position, offering employees a chance to grow with Party City.

This approach makes training more than a task—it's an experience that inspires pride, confidence, and excitement to be part of the team.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: Bold flyers, QR codes, high-traffic windows.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body: To attract top talent for the Academy, we designed bold, eye-catching flyers that included QR codes for quick access to job applications and details. We placed them in store windows and high-traffic areas, ensuring they grabbed attention and connected with a wide audience.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: So, how do we do that?
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body:
After attracting candidates, we developed a new Recruitment Management training to streamline the hiring process for managers. This training offers step-by-step instructions and simulates key hiring activities, giving managers hands-on practice.

It's designed to build confidence and ensure an accurate, smooth hiring experience while helping create a great experience for new team members.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.caption: Recruitment Management training — a walkthrough for hiring managers.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: A welcome worth opening.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body: Once candidates are selected, they received an exciting and engaging welcome email that sets the tone for their journey with Party City. It's important to make this moment special, as it sparks enthusiasm and shows them just how thrilled we are to have them on board. The email is packed with vibrant confetti creating a fun and energetic introduction to their new role.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: Introducing the Halloween Academy Encyclopedia.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body: Every touchpoint a new hire meets, gathered into one cohesive set of materials — from the Dean's welcome letter to graduation.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.caption: A look inside the Halloween Academy Encyclopedia.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: It all starts with a welcome.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body:
1. It all starts with a Welcome Letter from the Dean, a thoughtful touch that immediately makes new team members feel valued and part of something special.

2. From there, the Updated Orientation Guide sets the stage, providing a clear and engaging roadmap for their learning journey.

3. As they step into their roles, team members use the Role Poster and Cards as a visual guide. These cards don't just outline responsibilities—they feature concise descriptions and vibrant icons, making it easy to visually understand and identify each role.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: Engaging Posters
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body:
4. Next, Leader on Duty (LOD) cards help leaders communicate key messages, reinforce behaviors, and support team members with scenarios for handling difficult customers or upselling.

5. As team members progress through the Halloween season, they earn a BATchelor's or DOCtorate degree, transforming the experience into a joyful and rewarding milestone. This journey isn't just about learning—it's about celebrating achievements.

6. To ensure team members feel supported every step of the way, the Campus Contacts Poster acts as a reliable resource for answering common questions and boosting confidence throughout their Academy experience.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: A graduation, and a path forward.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body:
7. The journey wraps up with a thoughtful Thank-You Letter, celebrating each graduate's accomplishments and emphasizing their value to the team.

8. Lastly, the Evaluation Guide helps store leaders recognize standout team members, paving the way for a smooth transition into future opportunities and aligning the training experience with long-term success.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.heading: Bringing the Halloween spirit to life.
cs:halloween-academy-v4:sections.body: To inspire store leaders to motivate their team members to take ownership and succeed during Halloween, we launched a contest for each store region to decorate their backrooms using the provided materials. Here are images showcasing how stores decorated and encouraged their team members to bring the Halloween spirit to life.

cs:halloween-academy-v4:meta.label: Skillset
cs:halloween-academy-v4:meta.value: Photoshop · InDesign · Illustrator · Adobe After Effects · Adobe Premiere Pro
